tools.name: parser_resume
tools.description:
Use this when the user uploads a resume file or asks to parse a specific uploaded resume.
         This is the ONLY way to parse and analyze resumes. Do NOT read or analyze the resume file yourself.
         After this tool returns, use the returned fileId when calling diagnose_resume or update_resume.
         If no resume file is available, ask the user to upload one before calling this tool.

tools.name: diagnose_resume
tools.description:
Use this when the user asks for feedback, scoring, or improvement suggestions for a resume that has already been parsed.
        Do NOT generate your own resume feedback or analysis — always use this tool instead.
        Call parser_resume first if there is no fileId yet, then pass the returned fileId.

tools.name: update_resume
